caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with a boom microphone is centered against a plain, light-colored wall. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the lower-left corner of each scene. Throughout the clip, the man speaks while gesturing with his right arm. He begins with his right arm raised and slightly bent at the elbow. As the sequence progresses, he moves his arm further outward and lifts his hand higher, eventually opening his palm and extending his fingers upward in a waving or explanatory gesture. His left hand remains lowered and partially visible, with his fingers curled into a loose fist. His facial expression remains focused and steady as he speaks into the microphone.
